summary: Tested CRM Dashboard lead management functionality. Backend APIs working correctly (69 leads with pagination). Frontend loads and displays leads properly. Found pipeline stage ID mismatch between frontend and backend causing Dashboard Pipeline Overview to show zeros.

integration_issues.issue: Pipeline stage IDs mismatch between frontend PIPELINE_STAGES and backend API response. Frontend uses: new, follow_up, telecall, quotation, installation, completed, lost. Backend returns: new, contacted, site_visit, quotation, negotiation, converted, completed, lost. This causes Pipeline Overview to show all zeros except for matching stages.
affected_selectors: Pipeline Overview section on Dashboard tab

action_items: Align PIPELINE_STAGES in CRMDashboard.js (line 536-544) with backend API stage IDs. Either update frontend to use: new, contacted, site_visit, quotation, negotiation, converted, completed, lost OR update backend to use: new, follow_up, telecall, quotation, installation, completed, lost
critical_code_review_comments: PIPELINE_STAGES at CRMDashboard.js line 536-544 uses different stage IDs than backend API at routes/crm.py line 191-192
Backend /api/crm/dashboard returns pipeline_stats with stages: new, contacted, site_visit, quotation, negotiation, converted, completed, lost
Frontend expects stages: new, follow_up, telecall, quotation, installation, completed, lost
Only 'new', 'quotation', 'completed', 'lost' match between frontend and backend

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Leads display works, Pipeline Overview has data mismatch

test_credentials.note: MSG91 CAPTCHA blocks automated OTP login - used localStorage auth bypass for testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM Dashboard loads correctly after setting localStorage auth. Leads tab shows 69 leads with search, filter, and pagination working. Dashboard Pipeline Overview shows zeros due to stage ID mismatch between frontend and backend. MSG91 OTP login has CAPTCHA that blocks automated testing.

crm_dashboard_loads.details: CRM Dashboard route (/crm) loads correctly when authenticated via localStorage

leads_tab_displays_leads.details: Shows 'Showing 69 of 69 leads' with lead names, contacts, sources, stages, and action buttons

lead_stage_filter.details: Filter by 'New Lead' stage shows 63 leads

lead_pagination.details: Pagination shows 'Showing X of X leads'. With 250 per page limit and 69 total leads, all fit on one page

dashboard_pipeline_overview.details: Shows all zeros due to stage ID mismatch between frontend PIPELINE_STAGES and backend API response

backend_leads_api.details: GET /api/crm/leads returns 69 leads with correct pagination

backend_dashboard_api.details: GET /api/crm/dashboard returns correct pipeline_stats (new: 63, contacted: 2, etc.)

GET /api/crm/dashboard.response: Returns total_leads: 69, pipeline_stats with correct counts

root_cause_analysis.issue: Dashboard Pipeline Overview shows all zeros
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: Stage ID mismatch between frontend and backend
root_cause_analysis.fix_location: CRMDashboard.js line 536-544 PIPELINE_STAGES constant OR routes/crm.py line 191-192 stages list
